title: Fixture Cover-Letter Text Reachable by Real Users
root_cause_summary: Fixture content from apps/api/tests/fixtures/llm/cover_letter/default.json and retry.json was written into the production database and persists in 8 Application rows visible to real users (sarkar.vikram@gmail.com and admin@aether.local). The rows contain cover letters with fabricated achievements repeated verbatim across unrelated jobs, a clear marker of fixture/test data.

llm_client_module_doc.quote: It NEVER serves a recorded fixture as if it were live output (GAP-P6-AUTH-002): a fixture recorded before a fix would otherwise be delivered to a paying user as their 'tailored' résumé with no signal it is stale, canned content. Fixtures are served ONLY in `replay` mode.

auto_mode_implementation.behavior: On all live failures, raises LLMUnavailableError (mapped to HTTP 503). NEVER falls back to fixtures.

complete_method.logic: if mode == 'replay': return _replay() | if mode == 'auto': return _auto() | else: return _call_live()

fixture_fingerprints.key_phrase: I architected test-automation strategies that cut evidence effort from roughly 3 hours to about 15 minutes per scenario
fixture_fingerprints.context: This exact sentence appears in both fixtures (default.json and retry.json) and in all 8 database rows

database_findings.query: SELECT id, userId, jobId, createdAt FROM aether."Application" WHERE "coverLetter" ILIKE '%3 hours%15 minutes%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC

timeline.context: Rows created during Phase 6/7 and MANUAL-VERIFICATION test period

remediation.delete_sql: DELETE FROM aether."Application" WHERE id IN ('c597b074bbd6214c31dcf75ec', 'c3ebf6a97e318dbcacc7473dc', 'c7bcdeedaaad8c702f1a7dae6', 'ce01bad499189ac40e9e9c78f', 'cf876560bca329aeb86ec1391', 'c4bbc712a79c387b34580bb4a', 'c53d0b3ada038f7ce441dd018', 'c0e3601826b6258afd1ced52d')
remediation.user_impact: Minimal. 8 draft-stage applications will be removed. Users can regenerate letters via the UI.

prevent_recurrence.description: Ensure AETHER_LLM_MODE is always auto or live in production, never replay or record
Verify CoverLetterAgent never receives fixture responses in auto mode (add defensive logging)
Add test to verify no Application rows contain known fixture text
Update DEPLOYMENT-RUNBOOK.md to validate LLM_MODE before production deploy

verification_steps: Run DELETE query and confirm 8 rows are gone
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM aether."Application" WHERE "coverLetter" ILIKE '%3 hours%15 minutes%' — should return 0
Spot-check Application Tracker UI for affected users — no fixture text in newly generated applications
code_review_notes: The get_application() endpoint (apps/api/app/routers/applications.py:113) is a simple SQL SELECT. It does NOT load fixtures; it returns DB content exactly as stored.
CoverLetterRepository.create() (apps/api/app/repositories/cover_letter.py:21) simply inserts whatever cover_letter string is passed to it.
CoverLetterAgent._draft() (apps/api/app/agents/cover_letter_agent.py:439) calls self._llm.complete_json() with fixture_key parameter. This is the only point cover letter content could come from.
The LLM client's mode (auto/live/replay/record) controls whether fixtures are served. Production is configured to auto mode, which never serves fixtures on failure.

stale_seed_data.reasoning: Fixture content byte-identical in DB and files, rows created during test period, LLM mode is auto (never serves fixtures), no other mechanism in codebase loads fixtures in auto mode.

live_code_path_serves_fixtures.reasoning: Production AETHER_LLM_MODE=auto, _auto() method explicitly does not serve fixtures, no feature flag or override enables replay mode in production.

outstanding_questions: Who initiated the cover letter generations that resulted in these 8 rows? (Requires audit of aether.AgentRun logs, out of scope for this RCA.)
Was AETHER_LLM_MODE temporarily changed to replay/record, or did a live LLM call fail yet the agent still succeeded? (Requires audit of LLM call traces and agent logs, out of scope.)
